The Prodigy 3 is designed for supreme all-mountain enjoyment and durability in any conditions, making it ideal for both packed and powder snow.This intuitive, perfectly balanced, and stable ski features a 106 mm waist, enhancing your experience in nature's finest playground. Its Directional Twin shape and Elliptical Sidecut ensure user-friendly performance, suited for avid skiers looking to progress their skills across all the mountain has to offer. The Prodigy 3 belongs in your collection as an all-mountain quiver-killer ski, retaining the playful character the Prodigy Series is famous for.You'll love this ski if...You want a playful ski for all conditions, including powderYou want a ski that carves hard, but also easily pivots and smearsYou love to butter and occasionally ski or land backwardsYou are always on the look-out for the little pocket of pow that didnt get skied

json_ld_data.name: Prodigy 3
json_ld_data.description:
The Prodigy 3 is designed for supreme all-mountain enjoyment and durability in any conditions, making it ideal for both packed and powder snow. 

This intuitive, perfectly balanced, and stable ski features a 106 mm waist, enhancing your experience in nature's finest playground. Its Directional Twin shape and Elliptical Sidecut ensure user-friendly performance, suited for avid skiers looking to progress their skills across all the mountain has to offer. The Prodigy 3 belongs in your collection as an all-mountain quiver-killer ski, retaining the playful character the Prodigy Series is famous for.
You'll love this ski if...

  You want a playful ski for all conditions, including powder
  You want a ski that carves hard, but also easily pivots and smears
  You love to butter and occasionally ski or land backwards
  You are always on the look-out for the little pocket of pow that didnt get skied
